name: NightyVibe Diode Laser
shortDescription: 2500W intelligent diode laser with SAFE-OPTION technology. 40 million shot lifespan, digital handpiece with built-in shot counter. Includes professional medical training and complete business module.
description: The NightyVibe is an intelligent 4-wavelength diode laser developed with a focus on efficiency, safety, and premium technology. The intelligent control system provides a clinically data-driven interface, while SAFE-OPTION technology prevents incorrect or dangerous settings.
metaTitle: NightyVibe Diode Laser | 2500W, SAFE-OPTION, Intelligent Control
metaDescription: NightyVibe 2500W intelligent diode laser with 4 wavelengths and SAFE-OPTION technology. 40M shots, digital handpiece, professional medical training. Certified.

videoDescription.headline: NightyVibe – The Smart Laser for Professionals
paragraphs: The future of diode laser hair removal technology has arrived. The NightyVibe is an intelligent 4-wavelength diode laser developed with a focus on efficiency, safety, and premium technology.
The NightyVibe is not just a laser – it is a business upgrade. It comes with professional medical training, a marketing campaign plan, and genuine professional support.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the NightyVibe? We are happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Want to see the NightyVibe in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Erd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the NightyVibe diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we will help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why do professionals choose the NightyVibe?
featureRows.subtitle: 2500W power, SAFE-OPTION technology, complete business package.

features.title: 2500W power – lightning-fast treatments
features.description: The NightyVibe's 2500W power output is among the highest on the market. This power enables extremely fast coverage of large areas, drastically reduced treatment times, and serving more clients daily.
features.highlight: One of the highest-powered diode lasers on the market.

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for every skin and hair type
features.description:
The NightyVibe operates on four wavelengths, making it safe and effective for all Fitzpatrick skin types (I–VI).

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, most hair types
940 nm – darker hair
1064 nm – deep-rooted hair

features.title: SAFE-OPTION technology – maximum safety
features.description: SAFE-OPTION technology prevents incorrect or dangerous settings, ensuring maximum safety for every client. The intelligent control system provides a clinically data-driven interface – the device automatically optimizes settings.
features.highlight: SAFE-OPTION prevents incorrect settings – maximum safety.

features.title: Digital handpiece – built-in shot counter
features.description:
The modern touchscreen display ensures easy operation, while the digital handpiece with built-in shot counter enables precise treatment tracking.
Built-in shot counter for precise tracking
40 million shot lifespan
Contact cooling for painless treatments

features.title: Complete business package – more than just a laser
features.description:
The NightyVibe purchase includes comprehensive business support to help you succeed from the start.
Professional medical training – compiled by a cosmetology physician
Marketing campaign plan and pricing strategy
Client acquisition tips and business module
Follow-up and ongoing professional support
features.highlight: The NightyVibe is not just a laser – it is a business upgrade.

training.headline: Operator Training – Official Professional Education
training.intro: We provide official training for the NightyVibe diode laser with a certified certificate. The course was compiled by a cosmetology physician and is included in the device price.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Treatment parameter settings by skin and hair type
Practical treatments on models – on various body areas
Contraindications, client selection and pre-treatment protocols
Marketing and business module – client acquisition, pricing strategy
closingParagraphs: You can bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real environment.
After completing the training, we issue a certified professional education certificate confirming competence in operating the device professionally.
training.ctaText: I am interested in the training

testimonials.name: Katalin Nemeth
testimonials.text: The NightyVibe SAFE-OPTION feature is a huge relief. <mark>I don't have to worry about choosing wrong settings</mark> – the device simply won't allow it. And the 2500W power noticeably speeds up treatments.

testimonials.name: Szilvia Varga
testimonials.text: The business package is what truly sets the NightyVibe apart. <mark>The marketing campaign plan and professional medical training helped me launch my salon</mark>. The device itself is also fantastic.

expertQuote.quote: With its 2500W power and SAFE-OPTION technology, the NightyVibe is one of the safest and most effective diode lasers. The complete business package is especially valuable for salons just starting out.
expertQuote.author: Laszlo Horvath

functionCards.name: 2500W Power
functionCards.description: One of the highest power outputs on the market.

functionCards.name: Business Package
functionCards.description: Marketing plan, pricing strategy, client acquisition.

faq.question: What is SAFE-OPTION technology?
faq.answer: SAFE-OPTION is an intelligent safety system that prevents incorrect or dangerous settings. This means the device will not allow the operator to set parameters that are unsafe for the given skin type or hair type.

faq.question: What does the business package include?
faq.answer: The NightyVibe purchase includes professional medical training (compiled by a cosmetology physician), a marketing campaign plan, pricing strategy, client acquisition tips, and ongoing follow-up support.

faq.question: What is the shot lifespan?
faq.answer: The NightyVibe has a capacity of approximately 40 million shots, which means several years of lifespan with 10-15 clients per day.

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: Official professional education with a certified certificate, which is included in the device price. The course was compiled by a cosmetology physician.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 5-8 clients per day. Use our ROI calculator on the page for exact calculations!

faq.question: What warranty do I get?
faq.answer: We provide a 2-year comprehensive warranty. We have our own service team, and we provide a replacement device during repairs so your salon operations never stop.

whatsIncluded: Marketing campaign plan and business module
